{{Infobox madra
| name = Red
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can channel [[Red]] determination.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can fill himself with [[Red]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Red]] argues that going through the Gate would be like dying.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
